title: US Sets Initial Duties on Indian Solar Imports at 126%
description: The Trump administration set preliminary duties of 126% on solar imports from India after determining the country unfairly subsidized manufacturing.
content: The Trump administration set preliminary duties of 126% on solar imports from India after determining the country unfairly subsidized manufacturing.
